_comment: 인스타 캐러셀 9장 예제 — 에이나우 'Claude Code 7가지 꿀팁' 실증 버전. 본인 주제에 맞게 slides[].prompt 를 수정하세요. common_style 은 디자인 DNA 라 놔두는 걸 권장.
common_style: Instagram carousel slide design, 4:5 aspect ratio (1080x1350 px). Magazine editorial style, premium warm minimalist. - Background: warm hanji off-white #F7F2EC. - Primary text / headlines: deep red-bean burgundy #6E1A2B. - Accent color for highlighted words, labels and underline bars: bright red-bean coral #A83848. - Secondary text: burgundy at 55% opacity. - Optional premium accent (decorative bars/marks only, never body text): gold #C8973A. - Typography: Korean sans-serif (Pretendard-like), bold headlines, monospace for code. - Layout: generous whitespace, left-aligned, editorial magazine feel. - Mood: warm, premium, refined Korean-traditional, clean, modern.

slides.prompt: COVER SLIDE for carousel titled "Claude Code Guide". Layout: - Small coral uppercase label "CLAUDE CODE GUIDE" at bottom-left. - Large bold Korean headline: "해커톤 우승자의" (burgundy), then "꿀팁 7가지" (coral). - Short coral underline bar below headline. - Subtitle in muted burgundy: "저장 필수. 하나씩 적용해보세요." - Huge empty top area (composition breathing room).

TIP 01 slide. - Top-left small coral label "TIP 01". - Korean headline (burgundy + "CLAUDE.md" in coral): "프로젝트 루트에 CLAUDE.md 하나면 응답이 달라진다". - Middle: ASCII-art style folder tree in monospace font highlighting CLAUDE.md in coral. - Bottom tags in muted burgundy: "기술 스택   코딩 컨벤션   빌드 명령어".

TIP 02 slide. Korean headline: "코딩 전에 Plan Mode 먼저" ("Plan Mode" in coral). Middle: 3 large circular icons in a horizontal row — 분석 → 계획(coral, glowing) → 실행. Below circles: burgundy pill button "Shift + Tab". Bottom caption muted burgundy: "계획 없는 코딩은 시간 낭비."

TIP 03 slide. Korean headline: "서브에이전트로 병렬 처리" ("병렬 처리" in coral). Middle: 2x2 grid of 4 dark terminal-card panels (agent-1 lint / agent-2 test / agent-3 build / agent-4 docs), green checks. Bottom comparison: "순차 40분" (struck through muted burgundy) → "병렬 12분" (big coral monospace).

TIP 04 slide. Korean headline: "대화 길어지면 /compact" ("/compact" in coral). Middle: huge coral monospace text "/compact" with subtle muted burgundy caption "지금까지 작업 내용 요약해줘". Bottom: two horizontal progress bars — Before 92% (coral) / After 24% (green). Caption muted burgundy: "30턴 넘으면 반드시."

TIP 05 slide. Korean headline: "Worktree로 안전하게 실험해라" ("Worktree" in coral). Body: two contrasting blocks — Top: X mark + "main에서 직접 실험 → 망하면 되돌리기 힘듦". Bottom: arrow + "Worktree로 격리된 복사본 / 성공 → merge / 실패 → 삭제 / 리스크 제로" (마지막 줄 green). Caption: "원본은 그대로, 실험은 자유롭게".

TIP 06 slide. Korean headline: "나만의 슬래시 커맨드" ("슬래시 커맨드" in coral). Middle: dark rounded-corner command palette UI mock with 4 rows (/review /test /refactor /doc). Bottom monospace: ".claude/commands/review.md" with caption "프롬프트를 .md 파일로 저장하면 끝".

TIP 07 slide. Korean headline: "Hooks로 품질을 자동화해라" ("Hooks" in coral). Middle: vertical flow diagram of 5 circular badges — H(coral) Hook: PreToolUse / L(yellow) Lint+Type / T(green) Test / S(blue) Security / OK(bold coral) 통과 시에만 반영. Caption: "Hook 한 번 설정 = 영구 가드레일".

OUTRO / closing slide. Vertically centered, left-aligned: - Small coral uppercase label "SAVE & SHARE". - Large bold Korean headline: "하나씩 적용하면 체감이 확 됩니다" (with "확" in large coral). - Short coral underline bar. - Muted burgundy subtitle: "저장해두고 하나씩 써보세요." Most of canvas empty warm off-white space (premium editorial breathing room).
